episodes.title: What Growing Up in a Cult Taught Me
episodes.description:
Bad news travels 6x faster than good news! No wonder we're all frazzled :/ 

The world feels like it’s on fire right now.
Politics. AI. Economic instability. Constant bad news.
It’s no wonder so many of us feel anxious, overwhelmed… and a little hopeless.

What's I find interesting though is that I grew up in a cult where we believed the world was ending constantly. And without realising, I learned some unexpected ways to stay grounded in chaos.

In this video, I break down the 3 powerful tools to do this, including: 
- Regulate my nervous system in high-stress environments
- Focus on what’s actually in my control
- And choose a perspective that doesn’t add to the noise

The truth is the world has always had chaos.
What matters is who you choose to be within it.
If you’re feeling overwhelmed by everything happening right now, this is for you.

episodes.title: Petra Velzeboer – GBN Interview with Esther McVey & Philip Davies
episodes.description:
How exciting to get a call from GBNews asking me to join their Saturday morning TV programme to talk about life after cults and my books mission to challenge victim-status and offer people a way to take responsibility for their mental health! 

Having been on international stages, podcast and radio as well as filming and performing for commissions and companies, I’ve been picturing an Oprah style show going deep on all things humans and mental health and so (while I realise this is a 6 minute segment), it’s also immersing myself in a new world of possibility!
